The surgeon completes the first layer of suturing and begins the second layer using continuous sutures. The robotic system allows precise manipulation of the needle, facilitating base wall sutures with an inside-out, outside-in technique.
The surgeon uses precise suturing techniques to minimize exposure of the myometrium and suture material, showcasing the advantages of robotic wrist movements during the procedure.
